title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!
